paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.18, with a 0.98 percent increase from the prior close and a 31.1 percent decrease over the last 21 sessions. There have been 2 new news articles in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include announcements from TradingView and FinanzNachrichten.de regarding Fermi Inc.'s second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, which is scheduled for August 13, 2026. These announcements were made on July 21 and July 20, respectively.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including an 8-K form filed on July 15 regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form filed on July 13 regarding the resignation of director Miles Everson. Additionally, there was one Form 4 filing, but no Form 144 filings, among a total of 25 filings in the feed.
